titles.text: Simple 1500シリーズ Vol.77 The 水泳

descriptions.text: Simple 1500 Series Vol.77: The Suiei is a swimming simulation game that features the classic 4 swimming styles (Freestyle swimming, Breaststroke, Backstroke. & Butterfly stroke), up to four players to compete at the same time, the gameplay controls is using the gamepad analog sticks.
